---
title: "For Funsies"
format: html
include-after-body: "Footer.Rhtml"
---

# Meet the pets! {style="text-align: center"}

![](images/20230120_094856.jpg){style=".caption{    text-align: center; }" fig-align="center" width="301"}

#### Chester - He would be a Paladin.<br><br> {style="text-align: center"}

![](images/IMG_20171229_131517_225.jpg){style=".caption{    text-align: center; }" fig-align="center" width="298"}

#### Gizmo - He would be a sorcerer. <br><br> {style="text-align: center"}

![](images/20260205_114122.jpg){style=".caption{    text-align: center; }" fig-align="center" width="292"}

#### Mikan - She would be a Barbarian. <br><br> {style="text-align: center"}

![](images/20260315_125010.jpg){style=".caption{    text-align: center; }" fig-align="center" width="289"}

#### Shrimp + Snails - The shrimp would be Monks, the snails Rogues. {style="text-align: center"}
